headline: Norwegian Cruise Line Confronts Oil Shock As New CEO Resets Course
summary: Norwegian Cruise Line Holdings (NYSE:NCLH) is dealing with higher fuel costs and itinerary risks as conflict in the Middle East affects oil prices and travel routes. New CEO John Chidsey is rolling out internal changes that address past coordination issues, including operational reforms and upgrades to assets such as Great Stirrup Cay. The company is also focusing on tighter financial discipline as it responds to these external and internal pressures. For investors watching NYSE:NCLH, the...

headline: Stock Market Week: Sell Rules, Watchlists, Inflation Data And Iran
summary: With the market largely at the mercy of developments in the Iran war, it's a time for sell rules and watchlists.

headline: This Week's Market Wrap: Energy, Defense Stocks Take The Lead As Oil Prices Spike Higher
summary: Crude oil futures rose dramatically throughout the week, climbing from roughly $71 per barrel at the start of the week to above $90 by Friday. Read more here.
